operation_candidates.name: BaselineVectorIndex
operation_candidates.trigger: First-pass RAG over a new document corpus, unknown retrieval quality
operation_candidates.action: Build VectorStoreIndex with SentenceSplitter(chunk_size=1024, chunk_overlap=20), default top_k=2-5, default response synthesizer; ship to eval bench before tuning
operation_candidates.output: Working RAG endpoint + retrieval-quality baseline (MRR, hit-rate, faithfulness, relevancy)

operation_candidates.name: TuneChunkSize
operation_candidates.trigger: Faithfulness < target OR retrieved chunks truncated / incomplete
operation_candidates.action: Sweep chunk_size in {256, 512, 1024, 2048}, hold overlap at ~10-20%, re-evaluate faithfulness + relevancy + latency; default land at 1024 for prose, 80-160 tokens for code
operation_candidates.output: Optimal chunk_size pinned to index metadata; embedding model version locked alongside

operation_candidates.name: AddReranker
operation_candidates.trigger: Top-1 wrong but relevant docs appear in top-k; retrieval-hallucination symptoms
operation_candidates.action: Wrap retriever with CohereRerank or SentenceTransformerRerank; widen retrieval top_k to 20-50, narrow to top_n=3-5 after rerank
operation_candidates.output: Faithfulness +5-15pp on noisy corpora; lower context-window pressure

operation_candidates.name: AddHybridBM25
operation_candidates.trigger: Queries contain exact identifiers, error codes, SKUs, code symbols, rare jargon; dense-only misses them
operation_candidates.action: Add BM25Retriever via QueryFusionRetriever or vendor hybrid (Qdrant/Milvus alpha tuning); tune alpha per query type
operation_candidates.output: Recall lift on lexical-identity queries without sacrificing semantic queries

operation_candidates.name: DecoupleChunkScope
operation_candidates.trigger: Tension between precise embeddings (small chunks) and rich context (large chunks)
operation_candidates.action: Use HierarchicalNodeParser + AutoMergingRetriever OR SentenceWindowNodeParser; embed small, return large
operation_candidates.output: Precision-recall pareto improvement; LLM gets surrounding context that small chunks would have lost
operation_candidates.evidence: developers.llamaindex.ai (AutoMergingRetriever, HierarchicalNodeParser docs) ; restack.io hierarchical node parser

operation_candidates.name: RouteByQueryType
operation_candidates.trigger: Corpus serves heterogeneous tasks (summary vs lookup vs comparison) from one chat box
operation_candidates.action: Build per-task QueryEngines (SummaryIndex for digest, VectorStoreIndex for lookup, SubQuestionQueryEngine for compare) + RouterQueryEngine with LLM or Pydantic selector
operation_candidates.output: Each query type lands on the structurally correct retrieval primitive
operation_candidates.evidence: developers.llamaindex.ai router query engine docs ; deeplearning.ai Building Agentic RAG with Llamaindex

operation_candidates.name: DecomposeMultiHop
operation_candidates.trigger: Compare/contrast queries; queries needing facts from >1 document
operation_candidates.action: Use SubQuestionQueryEngine to decompose -> dispatch sub-questions to sub-engines -> synthesize
operation_candidates.output: Multi-hop answers that single retrieval cannot assemble

operation_candidates.name: IngestionWithDocstore
operation_candidates.trigger: Documents will be updated/deleted over time; production system
operation_candidates.action: Use IngestionPipeline with docstore + vector_store; pick upsert strategy (DUPLICATES_ONLY / UPSERTS / UPSERTS_AND_DELETE) based on lifecycle
operation_candidates.output: Idempotent re-ingestion; no duplicate vectors; deletion propagation

operation_candidates.name: MetadataFilters
operation_candidates.trigger: Multi-tenant corpus; cross-contamination between sub-collections; access control
operation_candidates.action: Inject structured metadata at ingestion (tenant, doc_type, date); use MetadataFilters or auto-retrieval at query time
operation_candidates.output: Hard isolation between tenants; targeted retrieval without re-ranking cost

operation_candidates.name: EvalLoop
operation_candidates.trigger: Any non-trivial RAG; pre-deploy AND continuously in production
operation_candidates.action: Generate eval QA pairs via LlamaIndex DatasetGenerator; run FaithfulnessEvaluator + RelevancyEvaluator + RetrieverEvaluator (MRR/hit-rate); gate changes
operation_candidates.output: Quantitative regression test for every change to chunking / embedding / retriever / prompt
operation_candidates.evidence: developers.llamaindex.ai evaluating module guide ; cookbook.openai.com evaluate_rag_with_llamaindex

operation_candidates.name: LockGlobalSettings
operation_candidates.trigger: Multiple modules construct LLM/embed_model independently; risk of config drift
operation_candidates.action: Pin Settings.llm and Settings.embed_model once in app bootstrap; never inline override

operation_candidates.name: AgenticWorkflow
operation_candidates.trigger: Need loops, tool calls, multi-step reasoning over retrieval; DAG is insufficient
operation_candidates.action: Use Workflows 1.0 event-driven steps (NOT deprecated QueryPipeline); wrap query engines as tools for FunctionAgent/ReActAgent
operation_candidates.output: Cycle-capable agentic loop with retrieval as one tool among many

anti_patterns: no eval loop / no labeled QA
treating LlamaIndex as general agent framework
